prompt.description: Natural language prompt describing the video to create (1-10,000 characters).
examples: Create a 30-second product demo for a new fitness app, with an energetic presenter
Make an explainer video about how solar panels work, using a professional tone
prompt.title: Prompt

avatar_id.description: Specific avatar ID to use. If not set, the agent picks one.
avatar_id.title: Avatar Id

voice_id.description: Specific voice ID to use for narration.
voice_id.title: Voice Id

style_id.description: Visual template/style ID from HeyGen's style library.
style_id.title: Style Id

orientation.description: Video orientation. Auto-detected from prompt if not set.
orientation.title: Orientation
